title: PeacePvP
description: A Custom PvP Texture Pack A Pack By Peacenplayer for sword pvp cpvp axe pvp and small shield low fire small totems and more...
body:
![An small item and animations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/680f789eef6dc47c4fefc6e38ac58d82bd4a9cd4.jpeg)・Simplified End Crystal: Inner details removed for a cleaner look,

・reduced explosion effects. Also includes low shield and other performance improvements. Smooth gameplay,

・fps boost, small items, small totem pop, small shield, low fire, fast better grass. All in one pack
